topic: Gemini 3 Pro launched with a multi-step agent mode that can run a marketing experiment end to end
content:
I gave Gemini 3 Pro one prompt at 9am Tuesday.

By 3pm it had a winner.

The brief. Run a headline test on a B2B SaaS landing page. Goal. Lift demo bookings. Cap. $200.

Here's what the agent did, in order.

1. Pulled the live page and flagged the H1 as the test variable.
2. Wrote 6 headline variants for different buyer intents.
3. Spun up a Google Ads campaign with UTM tagging.
4. Set a 95% significance threshold before launching.
5. Ran traffic for 14 hours.
6. Killed 2 underperformers early to protect spend.
7. Delivered a 1-page memo with winner, lift, and reasoning.

Total human time. 11 minutes. 4 to write the brief. 7 to verify.

The honest part. The agent optimized for CTR because that's what it could measure in 14 hours.

The winning headline pulled higher clicks and lower demo conversion downstream.

I would have caught it if the brief had named demo rate as the metric.

Fast agent. Sloppy brief. My fault, not the model's.

I cleaned up the prompt and turned it into a template I now use every time.

The Gemini Agent Marketing Prompt Pack.

1. Connect with me.
2. Comment "PROMPT" and I'll send it over.
